room1.name: feather
room1.alt: A white feather on a dark background

room2.name: key
room2.description: It is The Watcher's Key. You pick it up and feel its cold metal — on instinct, you press it into the lock. It fits perfectly.
room2.alt: An ornate bronze key with a dragon eye in the center

room3.name: walking-pot
room3.alt: A succulent in an ornate pot with monster claw legs

room4.name: fish-statue
room4.description: This item is surprisingly light for being a statue, at least underwater.
room4.alt: A bronze sculpture of two swirling betta fish

room4.name: ladder
room4.description: This invention is useful for accessing places gated by gaps and heights.
room4.alt: A rustic wooden ladder on a white background

room4.name: rubber-duck
room4.description: Its buoyancy can make the holder levitate underwater.
room4.alt: A cool rubber duck with sunglasses and gold chain in a float ring

room5.name: amethyst
room5.description: The mystical creatures grant you the Amethyst.
room5.alt: A purple amethyst crystal pendant on a gold chain
